blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,011 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 64".
